problem: How to store solar energy at grid scale without chemical battery degradation?
hypothesis: If Quantum tunneling through energy barrier is applied to chemical, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Calorimetric measurement with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
